description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:bionic Docker image, defining an apt-cache cache keyed "apt-cache" that stores the apt archives, and setting variables CI_TOOLS_PKGS, COVERAGE_PKGS, DAEMON_PKGS, GIT_PKGS, LIB_PKGS as listed. In a global before_script run for every job, export APT_CACHE_DIR to the repository's apt-cache directory, set PKG_CONFIG_PATH, update apt and install the packages from $LIB_PKGS $GIT_PKGS, then $COVERAGE_PKGS $DAEMON_PKGS $CI_TOOLS_PKGS, create /builds/accounts-sso, clone the signond repository, download and unzip the build_amd64 artifacts, run make install, and return to the project directory. Add a build_amd64 job in the build stage that runs export PYTHON=python3, then meson build -Ddebugging=true -Ddocumentation=true -Db_coverage=true, and ninja -C build, and stores the entire repository as an artifact. Add a test_amd64 job in the test stage that depends on build_amd64, runs ninja -C build test || (cat tests/test-suite.log && /bin/false), ninja -C build coverage-html, and ninja -C build libsignon-glib-doc, and also archives the repository as an artifact. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, depends on test_amd64, creates a public directory, copies the coverage report and generated HTML docs into public, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact.
